summary: CS Dashboard Testing Complete - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 22/22 tests passed for all 6 CS Dashboard endpoints. Frontend: All 5 metric cards, Individual/Team toggle, Period filter, Agent Revenue chart, Leaderboard, Monthly Trend chart, This Month vs Last Month chart, Pipeline section with empty state, and Agent Bifurcation chart all working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/cs/dashboard/stats returns all required fields (achieved_revenue, pipeline_revenue, total_agent_commission, total_head_commission, total_commission, etc.)
Backend: GET /api/cs/dashboard/stats all values are numeric
Backend: GET /api/cs/dashboard/stats respects period filter (today, this_week, this_month, this_quarter, this_year, overall)
Backend: GET /api/cs/dashboard/stats with view_mode=team returns team data
Backend: GET /api/cs/dashboard/stats with view_mode=individual filters by user
Backend: GET /api/cs/dashboard/agent-revenue returns list of agents
Backend: GET /api/cs/dashboard/agent-revenue items have agent_name, revenue, commission, upgrades fields
Backend: GET /api/cs/dashboard/agent-revenue respects period filter
Backend: GET /api/cs/dashboard/monthly-trend returns list of monthly data
Backend: GET /api/cs/dashboard/monthly-trend items have month, revenue, upgrades, commission fields
Backend: GET /api/cs/dashboard/month-comparison returns this_month_label, last_month_label, data fields
Backend: GET /api/cs/dashboard/month-comparison data items have day, this_month, last_month fields
Backend: GET /api/cs/dashboard/pipeline returns list
Backend: GET /api/cs/dashboard/pipeline items have path, label, count, revenue fields
Backend: GET /api/cs/dashboard/pipeline respects view_mode=team filter
Backend: GET /api/cs/dashboard/pipeline respects view_mode=individual filter
Backend: GET /api/cs/dashboard/leaderboard returns list
Backend: GET /api/cs/dashboard/leaderboard items have agent_name, commission, revenue, upgrades fields
Backend: GET /api/cs/dashboard/leaderboard sorted by commission descending
Backend: GET /api/cs/dashboard/leaderboard respects period filter
Backend: total_commission equals sum of agent + head commission
Backend: Leaderboard commission consistent with stats agent commission
Frontend: CS Dashboard loads at /cs/dashboard with all metric cards
Frontend: Achieved Revenue card shows AED 25,795 (15 upgrades closed)
Frontend: Pipeline Revenue card shows AED 0 (0 pitched)
Frontend: Agent Commission card shows AED 1,100 (7 total)
Frontend: Head Commission card shows AED 0
Frontend: Total Commission card shows AED 1,100
Frontend: Individual/Team toggle visible and works (data-testid='cs-dash-view-toggle')
Frontend: Clicking Individual toggle shows 0 values for super_admin (correct behavior)
Frontend: Clicking Team toggle shows team aggregate data
Frontend: Period filter dropdown works (data-testid='cs-period-filter')
Frontend: Agent Revenue horizontal bar chart renders with Nasida VN and Karthika P.K data
Frontend: Leaderboard shows ranked agents with commission amounts
Frontend: Monthly Revenue Trend area chart renders
Frontend: This Month vs Last Month line chart renders with correct labels (March 2026 vs February 2026)
Frontend: Pipeline section shows empty state message when no pitched upgrades
Frontend: Agent Bifurcation chart renders
seed_data_creation: None - using existing data (15 upgrades, 7 commission records)
context_for_next_testing_agent: CS Dashboard at /cs/dashboard fully tested. Key data-testids: cs-dashboard, achieved-revenue, pipeline-revenue, agent-commission, head-commission, total-commission, cs-dash-view-toggle, cs-dash-individual, cs-dash-team, cs-period-filter, leaderboard-{idx}. Backend endpoints: /api/cs/dashboard/stats, /api/cs/dashboard/agent-revenue, /api/cs/dashboard/monthly-trend, /api/cs/dashboard/month-comparison, /api/cs/dashboard/pipeline, /api/cs/dashboard/leaderboard. Real data: 15 upgrades, AED 25,795 achieved revenue, AED 1,100 agent commission. Two agents: Nasida VN (5 upgrades, AED 17,997) and Karthika P.K (2 upgrades, AED 7,798). Commission data in cs_commissions collection.
testing_method: Backend pytest (22 tests) + Playwright browser automation for frontend verification
